profile.name: Shubham Singh
profile.tagline: Creating AI-driven solutions for real-world challenges.

projects.title: Second Brain
projects.description: A second brain where you can store your memories and then you can chat with them for making critical decisions of your life . It uses vector databases for semantic search on your memories and uses LLM to help you chat with your memories .

projects.title: ClassPulse
projects.description: An AI classroom engagement platform where students respond in realtime whether they are getting concepts or not anonymously , they can ask for questions and teacher can see summary of multiple questions to understand exactly where the class is lagging behind . Also there is a leaderboard between teachers which tells in whose class most students get understood well .

projects.title: ChatBoot
projects.description: It is a simple but scalable chatting application build using Spring Boot with Spring Secuirity implementation . Uses Websocket for realtime communication .

projects.title: Diabetes Prediction
projects.description: A logistic regression model for diabetes prediction with about 85% of accuracy trained on large dataset from Kaggle .

projects.title: PollGram
projects.description:
It is a social media platform which is dedicated for Polls . I allows user to create , vote polls and understand the public opinions on the various topics . 
It has seamless secuirity with Spring , the voting system is consistent and efficient .
